ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "scrip" TEXT /* Scrip or financial instrument symbol */,
  "open" TEXT /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high" TEXT /* Highest price of the stock */,
  "low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the stock */,
  "close" TEXT /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_accounts" (
  "trading_account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the trading account */,
  "scrip" TEXT /* Scrip or financial instrument symbol */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance of the trading account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading account (e.g., margin, cash) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trading_account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_accounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the stock exchange is located */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used by the stock exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "scrip" TEXT /* Scrip or symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., stock, commodity, derivative) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the financial instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading transaction */,
  "trading_account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading account */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the trading transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the financial instrument traded */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the financial instrument traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_transactions_trading_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("trading_account_id") REFERENCES trading_accounts ("trading_account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_transactions_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data feed */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the market data feed */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of the market data feed (e.g., real-time, delayed) */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock exchange */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the market data feed (e.g., real-time, daily) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_feeds_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES stock_exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of the market trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the market trend */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the market trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id")
)
